## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (Biome — `biome check .`)
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] No unrelated changes (refactors/formatting in a separate PR)
- [ ] If user-facing: added/updated entry in [CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md) under `## Unreleased`
